Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meal_plans \(\\n  id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),\\n  user_id     UUID REFERENCES profiles\(id\),\\n  week_start  DATE,\\n  plan        JSONB,\\n  created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now\(\)\\n\);""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_sessions \(\\n  id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),\\n  user_id     UUID REFERENCES profiles\(id\),\\n  messages    JSONB DEFAULT ''''[]'''',\\n  created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now\(\),\\n  updated_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now\(\)\\n\);""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_usage \(\\n  user_id         UUID REFERENCES profiles\(id\),\\n  message_date    DATE,\\n  message_count   INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\n  PRIMARY KEY \(user_id, message_date\)\\n\);""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = ''''public'''' AND table_name IN \('"''"'profiles'"''"','"''"'subscriptions'"''"','"''"'meal_plans'"''"','"''"'chat_sessions'"''"','"''"'chat_usage'"''"'\) ORDER BY table_name;""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""ALTER TABLE profiles ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;\\nALTER TABLE subscriptions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;\\nALTER TABLE meal_plans ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;\\nALTER TABLE chat_sessions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;\\nALTER TABLE chat_usage ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""CREATE POLICY \\""profiles: own row\\"" ON profiles FOR ALL USING \(auth.uid\(\) = id\) WITH CHECK \(auth.uid\(\) = id\);\\nCREATE POLICY \\""subscriptions: own row\\"" ON subscriptions FOR ALL USING \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\) WITH CHECK \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\);\\nCREATE POLICY \\""meal_plans: own row\\"" ON meal_plans FOR ALL USING \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\) WITH CHECK \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\);\\nCREATE POLICY \\""chat_sessions: own row\\"" ON chat_sessions FOR ALL USING \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\) WITH CHECK \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\);\\nCREATE POLICY \\""chat_usage: own row\\"" ON chat_usage FOR ALL USING \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\) WITH CHECK \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\);""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user\(\)\\nRETURNS TRIGGER\\nLANGUAGE plpgsql\\nSECURITY DEFINER SET search_path = public\\nAS $$\\nBEGIN\\n  INSERT INTO public.profiles \(id\)\\n  VALUES \(NEW.id\);\\n\\n  INSERT INTO public.subscriptions \(user_id, tier\)\\n  VALUES \(NEW.id, ''''basic''''\);\\n\\n  RETURN NEW;\\nEND;\\n$$;""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user\(\)\\nRETURNS TRIGGER\\nLANGUAGE plpgsql\\nAS $$\\nBEGIN\\n  INSERT INTO public.profiles \(id\)\\n  VALUES \(NEW.id\);\\n  INSERT INTO public.subscriptions \(user_id, tier\)\\n  VALUES \(NEW.id, ''''basic''''\);\\n  RETURN NEW;\\nEND;\\n$$;""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS on_auth_user_created ON auth.users;\\nCREATE TRIGGER on_auth_user_created\\n  AFTER INSERT ON auth.users\\n  FOR EACH ROW\\n  EXECUTE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user\(\);""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""SELECT tablename, rowsecurity FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = ''''public'''' AND tablename IN \('"''"'profiles'"''"','"''"'subscriptions'"''"','"''"'meal_plans'"''"','"''"'chat_sessions'"''"','"''"'chat_usage'"''"'\) ORDER BY tablename;""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""SELECT trigger_name, event_object_table FROM information_schema.triggers WHERE trigger_name = ''''on_auth_user_created'''';""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""SELECT schemaname, tablename, policyname, cmd FROM pg_policies WHERE schemaname = ''''public'''' ORDER BY tablename, policyname;""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""SELECT prosrc FROM pg_proc WHERE proname = ''''handle_new_user'''';""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""SELECT column_name, data_type, column_default, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = ''''public'''' AND table_name = ''''profiles'''' ORDER BY ordinal_position;""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user\(\)\\nRETURNS TRIGGER\\nLANGUAGE plpgsql\\nSECURITY DEFINER\\nAS $$\\nBEGIN\\n  INSERT INTO public.profiles \(id\)\\n  VALUES \(NEW.id\);\\n  INSERT INTO public.subscriptions \(user_id, tier\)\\n  VALUES \(NEW.id, ''''basic''''\);\\n  RETURN NEW;\\nEND;\\n$$;""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/xlgmouhicypeanxhcqsf/database/query" -H "Authorization: Bearer sbp_6b52d19c85ab0f374a2d1e2bf79a385c60a773df" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""SELECT prosrc, prosecdef FROM pg_proc WHERE proname = ''''handle_new_user'''';""}')
